DeepBrain AI

7/10Overall Rating

Free Plan Available

About DeepBrain AI

DeepBrain AI is a ai video platform founded in 2016. It positions itself as “Hyperrealistic AI avatars for enterprise video” and is best suited for enterprise communications, AI news anchors and kiosks. Pricing starts at $30/mo, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Text To VideoYes
Image To VideoNo
Avatar Talking HeadYes
Screen RecordingNo
Auto CaptionsYes
TemplatesYes
Stock FootageNo
Voice OverYes
Api AccessYes
Batch ProcessingYes

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Very realistic avatars
  • Real-time avatar interaction
  • Multi-language support
  • Custom avatar creation

Cons

  • Expensive plans
  • Enterprise-focused
  • Limited free usage
